mapper.insert: INSERT INTO travel_library (user_id, title, description) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{description})

INSERT INTO library_items (library_id, place_id, day_number, item_order, visit_time, cost, memo) VALUES
(#{item.libraryId}, #{item.placeId}, #{item.dayNumber}, #{item.itemOrder}, #{item.visitTime}, #{item.cost}, #{item.memo})

INSERT INTO library_routes (library_id, from_item_id, to_item_id, transport, move_time, cost) VALUES
(#{route.libraryId}, #{route.fromItemId}, #{route.toItemId}, #{route.transport}, #{route.moveTime}, #{route.cost})
mapper.select: SELECT tl.library_id, tl.title, tl.description, tl.user_id, u.nickname, tl.view_count, tl.import_count, tl.created_at FROM travel_library tl JOIN users u ON tl.user_id = u.user_id WHERE tl.library_id = #{libraryId}

SELECT li.item_id, li.place_id, p.title, p.addr1, p.first_image1 AS img, li.day_number, li.item_order, li.visit_time, li.cost, li.memo, p.latitude, p.longitude, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM place_likes WHERE place_id = p.place_id AND user_id = #{userId} ) AS liked FROM library_items li JOIN places p ON li.place_id = p.place_id WHERE li.library_id = #{libraryId} ORDER BY li.day_number, li.item_order
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_library SET import_count = import_count + 1 WHERE library_id = #{libraryId}
UPDATE travel_library SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE library_id = #{libraryId}
